goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve 'turkish' food and should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'price range'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse' and should have 'a star of 4'.
The hotel should be 'in the same area as the restaurant' and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'whether they have internet', and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve turkish food and should be in the centre
Make sure you get price range
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse and should have a star of 4
The hotel should be in the same area as the restaurant and should be in the cheap price range
Make sure you get phone number, whether they have internet, and address
